def solve(nums)
  max_index = nums.length - 1
  sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
  sieve[0] = false
  sieve[1] = false
  (2..max_index).each do |i|
    if sieve[i]
      (i*2..max_index).step(i).each do |j|
        sieve[j] = false
      end
    end
  end
  sum_a = 0
  sum_b = 0
  nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
    if sieve[i]
      sum_a += num
    else
      sum_b += num
    end
  end
  (sum_a - sum_b).abs
end
